name: mind-coherence-suite
description: Marketplace hosting the Mind Coherence Suite: a portable, fork-and-diverge epistemic-discipline skill suite for AI agents.

plugins.name: mind-coherence
plugins.description: Belief-vs-knowledge calibration, holding contradictions, internal + external audit, and anti-sycophancy, as one continuous coherence cycle. Designed to be forked and diverged, not uniformly adopted.
